titleStmt.title: SII 27.64: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 64. (A.R. No. 497 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 8) set up in the prākāra of Mahishāsuramardini temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1310, Prabhava, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Friday, corresponding to 1387 A.D., May 3. The Śaka year was current.

It registers an assignment of income from lands to the temple of Durgā-Bhagavati by Bayiraṇṇa-voḍeya, son of Malla-gauḍa, a servant (?) of Irugappa-voḍeya, son of mahāpradhāna Bayicheya-daṇṇāyaka, the residents of the village Niruvāra and the servants of the temple, for the worship and offerings to goddess Durgādēvi and for the repairs to the temple. The record states that the king was ruling from his nelevīḍu at Dōrasamudra and that Mallappa-oḍeya of Honnāvura was administering the city of Bāraha-Kanyāpura (modern Bārakūr) and mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, vīra-pratāpa, kumāra Bukkarāya was in-charge of the administration of the town of Niruvāra-paṁchami.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.]
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . durgāyainamaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaru
ṣa 1310 neya prabhava saṁvacharada vayaśākha śu 15 śu śrī
manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima samu
drādīśvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvī
ra harihara mahārāyanu dōrasamudrada nele vīḍinalu sukhasaṁka
thā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttaṁ yihakāladalu honāvura
da mallappa Oḍeyaru bāraha kaṁnyāpurada nagaramaṁ pratipālisu
ttaṁ viddaṁdu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāyavibhāḍa bhā
śege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrī vīrakumāra pratāpa bukkarāyaru niruvāra
paṁcamiya grāmavāḷiddalli Anaṁtarasa Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁ śrīmaṁ
nmahāpradhānaṁ bayiceyadaṁṇāyakaru kumāra Irugappa Oḍeya
ra maneya mallagauḍeyana maga bayiraṁṇagaḷu Ā niruvārada durggā
bhagavatiya sthānavanu nālvaru mukālu vaḍḍigaḷuṁ grāmavū Oppi Āra
sinavāka koṁḍu Ā mukālu vaḍḍigaḷu grāmavū barasida śilāśāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdaḍe Ā bhagavatiya sthānavanu jīrnnōddhārava māḍisi Ā durggā bhaga
vatige Ā paṁcamiya nāgarigevū Aṁgaraṁgabhōga Āgra śrī bali Āyana na
yivēdya muṁtādavakke Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavaṁthā kaṭaḷiya
vivara Ādēviya kuḷāgra śivaḍi pramāṇa niruvāra grāmadiṁ bhatta Akki saha
bhattamū 698 hā 130 kāṭi teṁgineṁṇehā 133 karaṁdāḍi
yiṁ bhattamū 128 hā 35 yeṁṇe hā 381 Udaṁpāḍi pūṇabe -bhaḍi
bāḷiṁ bha mū 152 hā 33 Eḷḷeṇṇe hā 32 daṁpaḷiyaṁ mū 205 hā 34 . tuppa
hā 1 . bīja mogariṁ mū 31 kāga 182 cekāḍiyoḷage dēvasvadiṁ baha mu 65 ha 2 ...
citāriṁ kāga 882 haṁnihaḷiyaṁ bhattamū 12 bhaṁḍiyavara diṁeṁṇe hā
16 Āleyadiṁgaṁ mū 2 bhattamū 24 vo ṁeṁṇe hā 3 perupāḍiyiṁ bhaThe two numerals appear to have been engraved above
ttamū 6 Aṁtu nānābageyaṁ baha Ādāya kāhina bhattasaha bhattada mū
hāni 40 ṟalu kada mū 1323 hā 38 . rokkaga 1982 teṁgineṁṇe hāni 177
tuppa hāni 1 . yi bhatta baharāśi Okkalugaḷa sīme sāṁmya Allalliya Ā kaḍa
grāmaṇigevū nālvaru mukkālu vaḍigaḷige Asthānake naḍavaṁthā va chadavivara
taṭṭaga bāḷugaḷiṁda nayivēdyakke śūlapāṇi naḍasuvaru dēviya kaṁcina hāne
yyalu hāni [5 .] nāḍa hā 2 . Ubhayaṁ ha 7 . ge Ātanu dinaṁprati hā 4 . ge
naḍasuva māle 50 hā 3 kke ha 1 patreya naḍasuvanu Ā Upārada Ogarava koṁḍu
hōhanu śrīrāma naḍasuvadu Akki hā 2 rāghava naḍasuva Akki hā 1
bharata naḍasuva Akkihā Uṁṇi 5 naḍasuva Akki māna 2 Aṁntu taṭṭina bāḷu
gaḷi ḍe naḍavadu payi kaṁ Akki ḷatige hāne 14 ku 7 yi Akkiya nikki Oggara
vanukoṁḍu hōgi Eṁṇe nilita Uḷidaṁthā kaḷagadavaru mūṟu hottina
dēviya śrīkāryava naḍasuvaru muṭina bāḷugaḷiṁda kāṁtu naḍasumuṭu 4 kāṇaTwo letters which are not clear seem to have been siśe.
su naḍasuva muṭṭu 3 Ubhayaṁ 7 naḍisade vaḍigaru naḍasi dinaṁ prati naivē
dyakke kaṁcina hāniyali Akki hāni 3 . yanū Ikki Ogaravanu koṁḍu mūṟu ho
ttina śrībaliyanū pūrvadalā māḍuvaṁthā kelasavanu naḍasi baharu U
bhayaṁ naivēdyakke dinaṁ pratinaḍava Akki kaṁcina hāni 18 kā 3 yanu koṭṭu Ā Upā
rada Ogaravanu Uṁḍu dēviya śrīkāryava naḍasa baharu dēviya kūṭhāra
diṁde besuvaru Okalugaḷa le ttidaha yeṁṇeyaṁ naḍava naṁdādīvige U naivē
dyakke tappade varuṣa 1 kaṁ bhatta mū 12 gaṁdha dhūpakke varuṣa 1 kaṁ mū 14 Ā
ge varuṣa 1 kaṁ mū 4 dīvaḷigeya parvvadalu Āvaliṁge mū 4 . Āvala
dēvarigevū diya tahavarige mū 1 hā 10 habake bhaṁ ḍiyavarada
hā 13 diya paṟapaḷināyakana tōṭadiṁ naḍava Eṁṇe hā 3 śivarātri
ya parvvadalu mūṟutara śadapūje Ū bhūtabali paṁcāmṛtada bāḷe
ya haṁṇu teṁginakāya Aḍakelegaḷige bhattamū 3 . koṭhāradī Eṁṇe
hā 26 kuṁbhamāsadāṣṭami navamiyalu māḍuva Āyanakke yeṁṇe E
le Aḍake phalavanaṁgaḷige Āṟāṭa sahita bākāḍi ga 30 veccakke bhattamū 4
dēvālyadalu dinaṁ prati naḍava Agradalu Uṁba brāhmara jana 6 Āḍuva jana 1
Ubhayaṁ jana 7 kaṁ mēlu veccasaha bhattamū 134 hā 30 Ā sraṁṇaṁ
kīḷu śāṁtige vū mū 52 taṁtrige mū 24 mallūra nīla kaṁṭha pā
ṭāḷige mēluvecca Uḍugoṟe saha mū 64 kaṇakaṁge mū 40 bhattavanettiṁ ta
ha manuṣyaṁge mū 32 koṭhāradavaṁge mū 32 rājāṁgaṇavanū ke
ṟiyanu kasavanuḍuvarige mū 18 keṟiya vutsaṁgaḷa grāsake mū
ḍe 20 Aṁntu nayivēdya dhūpa tuppa Aḍakele dīvaḷige śivarātriya pa
kṣa Ayana Āga naḍava manuṣyara grāsa sahita sarvavecca Akki bhatta Utiba
saha bhatta dēviya hāḷiṁṟalu rada mūḍe 997 hā 230 grāmasaṁda ma
riyādeya dēvi tiṟuva hoṁnu tettu dēvālyahaṟau maṟivina kelasa kaṁbe
mu ṁge hatti te miḷi Ādavastuvanu varuṣa varuṣa tappa
de Ā grāmavu kāluvappagaḷu lekava māḍisi dēviya bhaṁḍārake Ādāyava mā
ḍuvaru yī dharṁmakke Ārobbaru kaṁṭakarādāruṟavaravaru vāraṇāsiya
sāvira kavileya koṁda dōṣadalu hōharu yi dharṁmmavanāru kelabaru
pālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavileyanu sabrāhmarige koṭṭa pha
lavahudu svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yōharēti vasaṁdharā vaṣṭivaruśa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
